title: Chilled Fruit Soup
ingredients: 6 medium-sized ripe peaches, peeled, pitted and sliced
¼ cup dry white wine (non-alcoholic works fine)
1 medium-size ripe cantaloupe, peeled, seeded and cut into ½-inch pieces
instructions: In heavy saucepan, combine peaches, wine, lemon juice, honey, cinnamon and nutmeg.
Lower heat, cover and simmer for 10 minutes.
Remove from heat and cool to room temperature.
Puree in blender or food processor.
In blender or food processor, puree orange juice and ¾ cantaloupe until smooth.
In large bowl, combine peach and cantaloupe mixtures.
Chop remaining cantaloupe and stir into soup.
Serve soup in chilled bowls or container and garnish with fresh mint and blueberries.
notes: Recipe can be doubled or tripled.
Pretty to serve in small decorative glasses at a tea or shower party.
This recipe reminds me of Deb Larsen, who loved it.
